FAILUsers can be listedConnectAs a Posit Team administratorsrc/vip_tests/connect/test_users.py::test_list_users0.27sTest procedureGiven Connect is accessible at the configured URLWhen I list all usersThen the user list is not emptyAnd the test user exists in the user listError tracebackCopyfixturefunc = <function check_test_user_in_list at 0x7f69c10931a0>
request = <FixtureRequest for <Function test_list_users>>
kwargs = {'test_username': 'testuser', 'user_list': [{'active_time': '2026-05-10T01:03:43Z', 'confirmed': True, 'created_time': '2026-05-10T01:02:03Z', 'email': '', ...}]}

    def call_fixture_func(
        fixturefunc: _FixtureFunc[FixtureValue], request: FixtureRequest, kwargs
    ) -> FixtureValue:
        if inspect.isgeneratorfunction(fixturefunc):
            fixturefunc = cast(Callable[..., Generator[FixtureValue]], fixturefunc)
            generator = fixturefunc(**kwargs)
            try:
                fixture_result = next(generator)
            except StopIteration:
                raise ValueError(f"{request.fixturename} did not yield a value") from None
            finalizer = functools.partial(_teardown_yield_fixture, fixturefunc, generator)
            request.addfinalizer(finalizer)
        else:
            fixturefunc = cast(Callable[..., FixtureValue], fixturefunc)
>           fixture_result = fixturefunc(**kwargs)
                             ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^

.venv/lib/python3.13/site-packages/_pytest/fixtures.py:915: 
_ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ 

user_list = [{'active_time': '2026-05-10T01:03:43Z', 'confirmed': True, 'created_time': '2026-05-10T01:02:03Z', 'email': '', ...}]
test_username = 'testuser'

    @then("the test user exists in the user list")
    def check_test_user_in_list(user_list, test_username):
        expected = test_username.split("@", 1)[0]
        usernames = [u.get("username") for u in user_list]
>       assert expected in usernames, (
            f"Test user {expected!r} (from {test_username!r}) not found in user list: {usernames}"
        )
E       AssertionError: Test user 'testuser' (from 'testuser') not found in user list: ['__bootstrap_admin__']
E       assert 'testuser' in ['__bootstrap_admin__']

2026/05/10 01:05:26.030718906 function (file = if (onefile) "Rplots.pdf" else "Rplot%03d.pdf",
2026/05/10 01:05:26.030725899 width, height, onefile, family, title, fonts, version, paper,
2026/05/10 01:05:26.030761085 encoding, bg, fg, pointsize, pagecentre, colormodel, useDingbats,
2026/05/10 01:05:26.030762648 useKerning, fillOddEven, compress)
2026/05/10 01:05:26.030787004 {
2026/05/10 01:05:26.030788086 initPSandPDFfonts()
2026/05/10 01:05:26.030803005 new <- list()
2026/05/10 01:05:26.030803726 if (!missing(width))
2026/05/10 01:05:26.030841397 new$width <- width

2026/05/10 01:05:26.030890740 new$fonts <- fonts
2026/05/10 01:05:26.030891712 if (!missing(version))
2026/05/10 01:05:26.030911469 new$version <- version
2026/05/10 01:05:26.030912531 if (!missing(paper))
2026/05/10 01:05:26.030950557 new$paper <- paper
2026/05/10 01:05:26.030951709 if (!missing(encoding))
2026/05/10 01:05:26.030963421 new$encoding <- encoding
2026/05/10 01:05:26.030963862 if (!missing(bg))
2026/05/10 01:05:26.030973620 new$bg <- bg
2026/05/10 01:05:26.030974041 if (!missing(fg))
2026/05/10 01:05:26.030982728 new$fg <- fg
2026/05/10 01:05:26.030983138 if (!missing(pointsize))
2026/05/10 01:05:26.030992376 new$pointsize <- pointsize
2026/05/10 01:05:26.030992877 if (!missing(pagecentre))
2026/05/10 01:05:26.031003116 new$pagecentre <- pagecentre
2026/05/10 01:05:26.031003537 if (!missing(colormodel))
2026/05/10 01:05:26.031087482 new$colormodel <- colormodel
2026/05/10 01:05:26.031100236 if (!missing(useDingbats))
2026/05/10 01:05:26.031119592 new$useDingbats <- useDingbats
2026/05/10 01:05:26.031120564 if (!missing(useKerning))
2026/05/10 01:05:26.031131234 new$useKerning <- useKerning
2026/05/10 01:05:26.031131645 if (!missing(fillOddEven))
2026/05/10 01:05:26.031142065 new$fillOddEven <- fillOddEven
2026/05/10 01:05:26.031142466 if (!missing(compress))
2026/05/10 01:05:26.031187431 new$compress <- compress
2026/05/10 01:05:26.031188302 old <- check.options(new, name.opt = ".PDF.Options", envir = .PSenv)
2026/05/10 01:05:26.031207619 if (!missing(family) && (inherits(family, "Type1Font") ||
2026/05/10 01:05:26.031208701 inherits(family, "CIDFont"))) {
2026/05/10 01:05:26.031229650 enc <- family$encoding
2026/05/10 01:05:26.031230662 if (inherits(family, "Type1Font") && !is.null(enc) &&
2026/05/10 01:05:26.031248235 enc != "default" && (is.null(old$encoding) || old$encoding ==
2026/05/10 01:05:26.031248706 "default"))
2026/05/10 01:05:26.031260318 old$encoding <- enc
2026/05/10 01:05:26.031260739 family <- family$metrics
2026/05/10 01:05:26.031270838 }
2026/05/10 01:05:26.031271429 if (is.null(old$encoding) || old$encoding == "default")
2026/05/10 01:05:26.031293214 old$encoding <- guessEncoding()
2026/05/10 01:05:26.031310643 if (!missing(family)) {
2026/05/10 01:05:26.031311595 if (length(family) == 4L) {
2026/05/10 01:05:26.031322947 family <- c(family, "Symbol.afm")
2026/05/10 01:05:26.031323377 }
2026/05/10 01:05:26.031340289 else if (length(family) == 5L) {
2026/05/10 01:05:26.031341271 }
2026/05/10 01:05:26.031356380 else if (length(family) == 1L) {
2026/05/10 01:05:26.031357261 pf <- pdfFonts(family)[[1L]]
2026/05/10 01:05:26.031375980 if (is.null(pf))
2026/05/10 01:05:26.031376962 stop(gettextf("unknown family '%s'", family),
2026/05/10 01:05:26.031394251 domain = NA)
2026/05/10 01:05:26.031403272 matchFont(pf, old$encoding)
2026/05/10 01:05:26.031404033 }
2026/05/10 01:05:26.031419172 else stop("invalid 'family' argument")
2026/05/10 01:05:26.031419954 old$family <- family
2026/05/10 01:05:26.031437487 }
2026/05/10 01:05:26.031438538 version <- old$version
2026/05/10 01:05:26.031449760 versions <- c("1.1", "1.2", "1.3", "1.4", "1.5", "1.6", "1.7",
2026/05/10 01:05:26.031450221 "2.0")

2026/05/10 01:05:26.031521004 else stop("invalid PDF version")
2026/05/10 01:05:26.031522187 onefile <- old$onefile
2026/05/10 01:05:26.031538383 if (!checkIntFormat(file))
2026/05/10 01:05:26.031539235 stop(gettextf("invalid 'file' argument '%s'", file),
2026/05/10 01:05:26.031556909 domain = NA)
2026/05/10 01:05:26.031557439 .External(C_PDF, file, old$paper, old$family, old$encoding,
2026/05/10 01:05:26.031568941 old$bg, old$fg, old$width, old$height, old$pointsize,
2026/05/10 01:05:26.031569372 onefile, old$pagecentre, old$title, old$fonts, version[1L],
2026/05/10 01:05:26.031588007 version[2L], old$colormodel, old$useDingbats, old$useKerning,
2026/05/10 01:05:26.031589009 old$fillOddEven, old$compress)
2026/05/10 01:05:26.031609949 invisible()
